product_results.title: Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra 5G, US Version, 256GB, Phantom Black - Unlocked (Renewed)

summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone to be of very good quality and express satisfaction with its functionality. The phone works perfectly with no issues reported. Users are also satisfied with the phone's appearance. However, customers have mixed opinions regarding the phone's condition, battery life, screen quality, and charging performance.

authors_reviews.title: Great buy
authors_reviews.text: Great quality no scratches and works just like new
authors_reviews.author: Waqas

authors_reviews.title: Awesome Phone and seller
authors_reviews.text: Great Phone in perfect condition. Looks and functions as brand new with the exception of the tiniest scratch on the edge metal, about 3mm thinner than a human hair. Great seller. Would buy from again.
authors_reviews.author: Thomas

authors_reviews.title: Twice NOT in excellent condition
authors_reviews.text: The description says that the phones are inspected and in excellent condition. I ordered a S23 Ultra and the exterior condition was excellent but there was clearly a loos component inside the phone. You could hear and feel it knocking around. So I did return it and figured I could of lucked-out. So I did order a second one. That one didn't have anything rattling inside of it but had a serious scratch on the screen. It wasn't long but very wide and deep. You could not ignore it. And it did have obvious signs of it being dropped on its edge. That I could of lived with ( it wouldn't be noticeable with a case on ) but the scar on the screen was too much.
authors_reviews.author: scott

authors_reviews.title: Flawless
authors_reviews.text: I was skeptical at start but have to say im blown away, my s23 ultra i recieved was basically brand new, not a scratch or chip anywhere, it was flawless, very pleased! Highly recommend
authors_reviews.author: Evan Frederick

authors_reviews.title: Works fine on Telus Canada.
authors_reviews.text: Arrived as scheduled ... Works fine on the Telus Network. No damage or scratches at all. Excellent condition. Actually doens't feel big in the hand as I'm coming from a Sonim XP8. Added an Otterbox Commuter case and Tempered Glass Screen Protector.
authors_reviews.author: chris chin

authors_reviews.title: Good but not like new
authors_reviews.text: Is a good product if you don't look for a new phone, but the item said like new and the fon had a lot of scratches en the sides, if you get a case it's not a problem, but still not like new
authors_reviews.author: Raul A. Rodas Regalado

authors_reviews.title: Le Samsung S23 Ultra 5G, tout simplement une bête !
authors_reviews.text: Après avoir passé un bon moment avec mon Samsung S23 Ultra 5G, je peux le dire sans hésiter : c'est un téléphone absolument incroyable ! Samsung a vraiment frappé fort avec ce modèle.Dès la première prise en main, on sent la qualité. L'écran est juste sublime, les couleurs sont éclatantes et la fluidité, que ce soit pour scroller ou jouer, est irréprochable. C'est un vrai plaisir pour les yeux, que ce soit pour regarder des vidéos ou travailler.Et parlons de la performance ! Ce téléphone est une vraie bête de course. Tout est incroyablement rapide, de l'ouverture des applications les plus lourdes au multitâche intensif. Zéro lag, zéro ralentissement, même quand je pousse la machine. Que vous soyez un gamer, un créateur de contenu ou simplement quelqu'un qui utilise beaucoup son téléphone, le S23 Ultra 5G ne vous décevra pas.Bien sûr, l'appareil photo est à tomber par terre. Les photos sont nettes, détaillées, même en basse lumière. Le zoom est bluffant, c'est comme avoir un télescope de poche ! Et la batterie tient super bien la charge, même avec une utilisation intensive. C'est un point crucial et il remplit toutes ses promesses.Bref, si vous cherchez le top du top en matière de smartphone Android, le Samsung S23 Ultra 5G est le choix idéal. C'est un investissement, oui, mais il les vaut largement.
authors_reviews.author: Coskun

authors_reviews.title: Stopped working after 3 months
authors_reviews.text: This cellphone has issues to connect with the S pen since the beginning (I was not planning to use it I tolerated it).After a couple of weeks the front camera began to fill with dust and rigth after 91 days of normal use the camera (front and rear) stopped working and now is not working at all.It was never submerged, overloaded, dropped, or exposed to extreme weather.I can't return this item because the window was closed a day ago.It looked good aesthetically but the reality is that I paid too much money for a poorly repaired device.
authors_reviews.author: Luis
